## Summary

Describe the motivation and the user-facing change.

## Type

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test/tooling

## Scope

- [ ] CLI
- [ ] Dashboard
- [ ] Website/docs
- [ ] Shared package
- [ ] CI/release

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run security:audit`

## Screenshots

Add before/after screenshots for dashboard or website changes.

## Notes for Reviewers

Call out risky areas, migrations, release impact, or follow-up work.
